sections.heading: These Regulations may be cited as the Medicines and Allied Title
sections.text: Substances (Fees) Regulations, 2016.

sections.heading: The fees set out in the Schedule are prescribed for the Prescribed
sections.text:
matters specified therein. fees
Copies of this Statutory Instrument can be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka. Price K16.00 each.
